emails.subject: Re: Airbnb Reimbursement Request [CLSF-04213351] [HM2THC43B4]
emails.body:
Hi Miza,

Giulia sent me the following message when requesting a charge for damages - "Ho trovato la porta d'ingresso spalancata, per fortuna non manca niente nell'appartamento. Un po' più di attenzione la prossima volta", translated to stating that I had left the door open upon leaving the airbnb, but that nothing had been taken from the apartment. This is all the information I have regarding the "damage" she reported. I disputed the charge because (1) I do not think I left the door open, and (2) even if so, $1088 seemed like an exorbitant charge when the booking (after taxes) was approximately $60.
emails.snippet: Giulia sent me the following message when requesting a charge for damages - "Ho trovato la porta d'ingresso spalancata, per fortuna non manca niente nell'appartamento.

Best regards,
Madeline Mercado-Chaj
TikTok Recruiting

emails.originalBody:
Hi Karthik,

Just passing this along to make sure you got this message.

Let me know if you have any questions.
Best,
Julia

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: <no-reply@paymentworks.com>
Date: Mon, Jul 28, 2025 at 3:52 PM
Subject: Payee Registration Returned - Karthik Sreedhar
To: <je2676@columbia.edu>

New Vendor Request Returned New Vendor Request Returned Hello Julia
Eshaghpour, As part of the onboarding process, Columbia University
determined that there were issues with Karthik Sreedhar’s registration that
needed to be corrected before
ZjQcmQRYFpfptBannerStart
This Message Is From an External Sender
This message came from outside your organization.

ZjQcmQRYFpfptBannerEnd
[image: PaymentWorks] New Vendor Request Returned
Hello Julia Eshaghpour,

As part of the onboarding process, Columbia University determined that
there were issues with Karthik Sreedhar’s registration that needed to be
corrected before the onboarding process can be completed. The following
message was sent to the payee to assist them with fixing any issues:

*Hello and thank you for your resubmission, This message is to request the
following adjustment be made to your submission still outstanding: 1-Under
"Additional Information", under "1099 Tax Information for individuals",
please select Other Income Payments. Once changes have been made, please
resubmit. If you have further questions regarding Columbia’s specific
vendor management process, please visit: Vendor Management | Columbia
Procurement If you are having difficulty making changes to the submission
and reviewing this message, within your browser, you can right click on the
tab that contains the PaymentWorks website, and select duplicate. This will
allow you to operate two sessions, so you can review this message and
revise your submission at the same time. Thank you.*
